name: Bigabid
description: Mobile DSP for programmatic user acquisition and retargeting with algorithmic bidding and real-time data analysis.

seo.title: Bigabid — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Bigabid: Mobile DSP for programmatic user acquisition and retargeting with algorithmic bidding and real-time data analysis.

when_to_use: Algorithmic CPI bidding for mobile game user acquisition at scale
Retargeting dormant app users with real-time behavioral data bidding
Programmatic mobile UA with transparency into bid-level performance
Scaling Android UA via programmatic DSP with real-time optimization

pros: Handles both UA and retargeting in one DSP
cons: Dashboard UX is clunky for campaign setup
review.verdict: Functional mobile DSP with decent ML, but nothing here breaks out vs the crowded tier-2 pack.
review.best_for: Mid-size apps running both acquisition and retargeting under one contract.
review.not_for: Publishers needing top-tier scale or best-in-class creative automation.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
